Your <retrieve_tools> JSON was well-formed, but the retrieval fields did not match the required interface.

In your next assistant response, rewrite it using the required meta-tool schema.
You MUST include:
- meta_tool

Guidance:
{retrieve_request_instructions}

Expected structure:

<retrieve_tools>
{
  "meta_tool": "by_output_info or by_inputs or by_io_info",
  "...": "required fields depend on meta_tool"
}
</retrieve_tools>
